category_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts attachments from MIME encoded email packages; official GitHub repository describes ripMIME as a MIME/email package decoder.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official repository named inflex/ripMIME; official GitHub title uses ripMIME capitalization.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the repository documentation surface; source_facts.homepage provides the official project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/inflex/ripMIME; per instruction it was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions MIME encoded email packages and attachment extraction; source_facts.executables lists ripmime.
